headline: Fisk Electric Awarded $26.9 Million Electrical Renovation Project
summary: LOS ANGELES, July 21, 2026--Tutor Perini Corporation (NYSE: TPC) (the "Company"), a leading civil, building and specialty construction company, announced today that its subsidiary, Fisk Electric Company ("Fisk"), has been awarded an electrical renovation project valued at approximately $26.9 million by a confidential customer for a healthcare facility in Houston, Texas.
